final:
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input S,
    output reg Y
);always @(*) begin
        if(S == 0) begin
            Y = A;
        end
        else begin
            Y = B;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Y = ~A;
      Y = ~B;
    end
  end

endmodule
